Shallow submodules (from repository root). Adjust branch/tag as needed; URLs follow typical upstreams.

Bereits im Repo:
  - third_party/freecad — https://github.com/FreeCAD/FreeCAD.git (branch main, --depth 1)
  - third_party/occt — https://github.com/Open-Cascade-SAS/OCCT.git (Tag V7_9_3 = OCCT 7.9.3, shallow clone)
  - third_party/coin — https://github.com/coin3d/coin.git (Tag v4.0.8, shallow clone)
  - third_party/pivy — https://github.com/coin3d/pivy.git (Tag 0.6.11, shallow clone)
  - third_party/smesh — https://github.com/looooo/SMESH.git (Tag vtk9.6_occt7.9.3, shallow clone; rekursive Submodule für Salome/Netgen-Quellen)
  - third_party/netgen — https://github.com/looooo/netgen.git (Tag v6.2.2601, shallow clone)

Weitere Beispiele (noch nicht angelegt):

  (Platz für weitere Submodule)

Nach Änderungen: git submodule update --init --recursive --depth 1  (oder: pixi run submodules-init)
